programme.title: E9 - Seattle Space Needle, USA
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.title: E38 - Cinema Scoot
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film.

programme.title: E11 - Flight
programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: E10 - Recital
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: E21 - It's Time To Eat Green Banana And Saltfish
programme.desc: JoJo wants to bake banana loaf for Jared, who's coming to dinner, but the bananas are too green. It's time for a Gran Gran plan - what can they make with green bananas?

programme.title: E26 - The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: E15 - Brussels Sprout
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's tiny Brussels Sprout performing I'm Mighty and proving how great he is.

programme.title: E24 - Trouble Bubbles
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant bubble together. They float through the air until Supertato and Evil Pea pop the bubble by driving it into a supermarket sign.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E26 - Sleepytime
programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: E38 - The Nature Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels can learn more about nature and wildlife if they follow five easy steps: watch carefully, stay at a distance, don't interfere, be patient and alert, and stay quiet.

programme.title: E161

From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: Lighting Up the Sky
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build solar-powered lights to help them feed an injured kiwi in the forest.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Mosaic Madness
programme.desc: Doki accidentally breaks Anabella's vintage tea tray and she's mad. Doki wants to make it up to her, but how can he fix her broken tea tray? The team heads to Istanbul, Turkey, where a ‘puzzle solving pro' is putting together fragments of an ancient ruin.

programme.title: Natural Disasters
programme.desc: Philippe visits the University of Miami to check out a lab that can simulate a category 5 hurricane. At the University of Reno he explores the so called 'shake table' that designs buildings that can hold up during earthquakes.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets have to look after squealing piglets, get uncomfortably close to a giant horse that is having an internal examination, and do health checks on tiny homeless kittens.

programme.title: It's Gala Time!
programme.desc: As the ice skating season draws to a close, there is the annual event in the calendar that everyone is talking about. All the Ice Stars gather together for some sensational Hollywood-themed performances. For the Icicles, it's the last time they'll skate together.

programme.title: Lighting Up the Sky
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build solar-powered lights to help them feed an injured kiwi in the forest.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Pilou and the Scooter Chase
programme.desc: It's Pilou's birthday, and the Buffycats surprise her with a kick scooter! Pilou is super happy, and her dog friend Terry helps her learn how to ride it. But the cat catchers trap the Buffycats! Will Pilou manage to save her furry fellows?

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Giants of Japan
programme.desc: Doki decides to go to the Ogasawara Islands, Japan, to make his own deep sea nature video, and get footage of the rare and elusive giant squid! How hard could it be? The team learns that you have to practice and prepare before taking on big challenges.

programme.title: Melissa Millett: Amazing Pets
programme.desc: Melissa trained her dog and cat to become a record-breaking duo. She shares with Alan Pixsley the fundamentals of animal training and what it takes to become the very best. But what will be the one thing that Alan can learn from Melissa and his new furry friends?

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: The Many Sides of Triangles
programme.desc: Eric tests the strength of a paper chair. Will it buckle under pressure or will it stand up to the test? Triangles are inherently strong because they form a fixed shape that's been used in architecture throughout the ages, but are they really the strongest shape ever?

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets have to look after squealing piglets, get uncomfortably close to a giant horse that is having an internal examination, and do health checks on tiny homeless kittens.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E3 - So Long and Thanks for All the Fish
programme.desc: Bundle up as an icy October storm complicates the race to the finish line. See Big Boi bounce after a stumble before tragedy hits QuadMom, and cheer as fan fave BoldFace hits her stride despite her clingy kid, Raccoon. But who will wear the crown?

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E3 - Africa

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E123
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Micro Diver: Shiitake Mushroom And Cashmere
programme.desc: A hidden microcosm lies right beside our everyday lives-an unseen frontier just beyond the reach of the naked eye. We dive into this mysterious realm to uncover the secrets behind familiar questions, revealing wonders that transform the way we see the world. A journey of discovery and delight into the micro world.

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E4 - Ceylon Tea Trails, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Monica and Rob travel to the highlands of central Sri Lanka to learn about Ceylon Tea Trails - a series of colonial era bungalows that have been renovated and revisioned by a local family of tea entrepreneurs. Monica works with the tea pickers and learns the importance of the industry to the country, while Rob tracks leopards in the surrounding plantations.

programme.title: E18 - Let's Play At Having Ideas
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E1 - Until Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Idriss's secret is out in the open and everyone in the law firm knows that he only has a few months left to live. Assisted by Claire, Nadia defends a man accused of having killed his wife, suffering from Alzheimer's disease. An act of love or premeditated femicide?

programme.title: E2 - Legitimate Violence
programme.desc: Idriss defends Duval, accused of killing a man trying to steal from him. Legitimate defence? It seems obvious but the facts and the judge's investigations challenge his client's version. Nadia comes to the assistance of her partner Alice, a teacher accused of having hit a pupil in her class.

programme.desc: Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

programme.title: E513 - iBust A Thief
programme.desc: When Sam's laptop gets stolen, the iCarly gang tries to help track down the thief.

programme.title: E107 - #ToddlerClimbing
programme.desc: A competing babysitting service is posting fake, bad reviews about Sam and Cat's babysitting service. Sam and Cat confront their new competition and discover they're not what they appear to be.

programme.title: E32 - Race To The Bottom
programme.desc: The race is on to find the minerals needed to enable the world's transition to clean energy and vast reserves of those minerals lie at the bottom of the Pacific. But scientists warn it risks catastrophic damage to our oceans.

Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: Keep Chasing: Hunt
programme.desc: After a high-ranking North Korean official requests asylum, KCIA Foreign Unit chief Park Pyong-ho (LEE Jung Jae) and Domestic Unit chief Kim Jung-do (JUNG Woo Sung) are tasked with uncovering a North Korean spy, known as Donglim, who is deeply embedded within their agency. When the spy begins leaking top secret intel that could jeopardize national security, the two units are each assigned to investigate each other. In this tense situation where if they cannot find the mole, they may be accused themselves, Pyong-ho and Jung-do slowly start to uncover the truth. In the end, they must deal with an unthinkable plot to assassinate the South Korean president...

programme.title: The Sleep Curse
programme.desc: During Japan's wartime occupation of Hong Kong in 1941-1945, a young translator's collaboration with the enemy results in his life being cursed by a murdered 'comfort woman' forced to become a sex slave. Forty-five years later, the man's sins come back to haunt his son, a professor specializing in sleeping disorders, when the lady's ghost returns for vengeance.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E1 - Excavator vs. Safe
programme.desc: Episode 101 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features BCB Air Cannon vs. Line X coating; an automated paintball turret vs. a worlds record holding slingshot marksman; and the RX Rock Breaker vs. the inpenetrable Brown Safe.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne joins his foodie friend Amy Luttrell to help cook breakfast for his friends at the Bonorong Wildlife Sanctuary after having a cuddle with some of Tasmania’s unique animals. On his way down to Hobart Ben stops off at a boutique, family-owned Stefano Lubiana Winery, which overlooks the picturesque River Derwent.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne explores the infamous Salamana Market in Hobart where he speaks with local producers about their Fresh Tasmanian Produce. Ben spends his evening enjoying the Hobart nightlife.

programme.title: E6 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs.

programme.title: E3 - The Payoff
programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E9 - One Day I'll Go To Paimpol With You
programme.desc: Every two years, the Paimpol festival celebrates sea shanties. On the island of Yeu, many people keep this oral and musical tradition alive. A meeting with Les Tribordais, a local group, and with Clement Bertrand, singer and member of the group Varek.

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E5 - Urban Farming
programme.desc: While we are rethinking our relationships with towns and our buying habits, urban farming is becoming part of the conversation. A movement on the rise uniting community gardens, individuals, large producers and urban farming cooperatives.

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E8 - Raamin Samiyi
programme.desc: Pastry chef Raamin Samiyi, originally from New York, is known as the king of donuts in Paris. After his first trip to Reunion Island, he created the Bourbon, a donut paying tribute to the ''intense island,'' filled with vanilla and dusted with coffee.

programme.title: E11 - Sancy, Lord Of The Clouds
programme.desc: Sancy, in the Puy-de-Dome, is the highest peak in the Massif Central. We go on a journey of discovery to explore this volcanic mountain in Auvergne, on a stormy day. An endless panorama transformed by the whirling snow: a veritable paradise for all who love winter!

programme.title: E2 - Aboard The Goldenpass Belle Epoque, From Montreux To The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: The GoldenPass Belle Epoque is a historical train. Twice a day, it carries its passengers from Montreux to the Bernese Oberland, through the picturesque vineyards of Lavaux, the Gruyere Valley and the jet-set destination of Gstaad.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!

programme.title: E8 - Raamin Samiyi
programme.desc: Pastry chef Raamin Samiyi, originally from New York, is known as the king of donuts in Paris. After his first trip to Reunion Island, he created the Bourbon, a donut paying tribute to the ''intense island,'' filled with vanilla and dusted with coffee.

programme.title: E9 - One Day I'll Go To Paimpol With You
programme.desc: Every two years, the Paimpol festival celebrates sea shanties. On the island of Yeu, many people keep this oral and musical tradition alive. A meeting with Les Tribordais, a local group, and with Clement Bertrand, singer and member of the group Varek.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E13 -Food Fight!
programme.desc: It’s the return of the Top Chef Junior Food Fight! The gloves are off as the final four chefs compete in a head-to-head food fight in a boxing ring and a stadium full of fans & family members cheering them on. Over four rounds of culinary battle, the winning chefs advance and square off in the finals for the championship belt, while the losing chefs face off in a final cook for their culinary lives. Also, the tables turn when our judges pair up and step into the ring to compete in a dried chili battle of their own. The chefs take the judges’ position and hijinks ensue, but it’s not all fun and games. The competition heats up again, and so does the heat intensity of the peppers as the rounds advance. Which chefs will prove they have what it takes to cook when the pressure is turned all the way up? The heat is definitely on!

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

E17 - Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Ten years after a young mother allegedly abandoned her family, her mother-in-law reveals a shocking secret: she believes both of her daughter-in-law's lovers murdered her.

programme.title: E3 - Drunk Horse & Buggy
programme.desc: A man proposes to his girlfriend while getting arrested; an aquarium worker helps catch a shark thief; a horse & buggy turns dangerous when a drunk man is operating it; and more.

programme.title: E5 - A World Of Hurt
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.desc: A man proposes to his girlfriend while getting arrested; an aquarium worker helps catch a shark thief; a horse & buggy turns dangerous when a drunk man is operating it; and more.

programme.title: E5 - A World Of Hurt
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: E1 - Hooked & Booked
programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.title: E3 - Madison Nygard
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonising details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party.

programme.title: E529 - Complex Terror
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion sparks a manhunt for a stranger terrorising a Tulsa housing complex.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours (1995)
programme.desc: Cheung is a veteran dubbing artist, happily married to Kitty and have a daughter. One night, Kitty has a nightmare that Hong Kong dollar is going to plunge. She wakes up and demands that the whole family to emigrate. While they are busily arranging the emigration matters, Cheung is promoted. Kitty then decided Cheung should stay in Hong Kong as to earn more money and she and their daughter will stay and wait in Canada. Cheung who stayed alone in Hong Kong, thus begins the affair with his beautiful boss. When Kitty learns Cheung's affair, she threatens a divorce. Meanwhile, Cheung finds his boss is only frustrated him, Cheung quits and leaves for Canada where Kitty is already pregnant their second child...

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.title: Tricky Brains
programme.desc: Jing Koo, is hired by Kam to get rid of Chi, to be the manager of the company. But he finds himself being cheated. He regains his confidence and competes with the 'King of Tricks'...

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.desc: The very first and the most recent MasterChef winners Julie Goodwin and Nat Thaipun return to the kitchen for today's two round elimination that will determine this year's Top 5.

programme.title: E8 - Bringing The Heat
programme.desc: We're turning up the heat! Buddy visits two iconic hotspots who are famous for their intensely spicy dishes. First, he heads to Jitlada to see if he can withstand the heat of their Thai Jungle Curry.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E36 - Candy Revolution
programme.desc: A cereal executive's bold idea to finance the 'Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory' movie will kick-off a sweets revolution that produces some of the most iconic, imaginative confections in history.

programme.title: E8 - Sarawak (Malaysia)
programme.desc: Explore the forgotten kingdom of the White Rajahs of Sarawak, and uncover the disappearing headhunting tribe known as the Ibans.

programme.title: E7 - The Sunken Legend
programme.desc: A powerful hurricane forces Jeff's team into a secluded cove, where they investigate The Lombrac, a legendary 18th-century ghost ship. The divers recover intriguing clues from the murky depths.

programme.title: E250 - Jacques Vallee: Ufo Pioneer
programme.desc: Dr. Jacques Vallee holds multiple scientific degrees and is one of the fathers of the internet. Will Dr. Vallee's work lead to answers about what has been happening in our skies for thousands of years?

programme.title: Whispers Of The Earth - How Our Planet Came To Be - Part 2
programme.desc: Earth influences all life on our planet. The same is true in reverse: Animals, plants, and inanimate matter also shape habitats. But humans are currently changing this dynamic cycle.

programme.title: Uganda's Urban Water Fix: Low-Cost Tech That Cleans Groundwater
programme.desc: A low-cost technology is being used to purify groundwater and recycled wastewater in Uganda. Also: Urban Nigerians embrace sack farming.

programme.title: No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: Ai: Where It's Risky - And Where It's A Game-Changer
programme.desc: A research team shows how easily AI models can be coaxed into giving dangerous responses despite output guardrails. But it's also driving innovation and technical progress in fields like healthcare and textile recycling.

programme.title: No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: How To Build Homes That Better Survive Disasters?
programme.desc: After hurricanes, floods, or wildfires, we often see 'miracle houses” - standing strong while others break. What's the secret behind their survival? We look at different types of buildings for these types of extreme weather events.

programme.title: Mumbai Fishers Battle Climate Change And Modernization
programme.desc: In Mumbai, climate change is eroding trust among the Koli fishing community. Plus: In Cambodia, rising heat and flooding disrupt children's education.

E3 - Madrid, Part 3
programme.desc: Michael ends his long weekend on a high as he dines at the oldest restaurant in the world, reputedly, and makes a poignant pilgrimage to his uncle's old flat he first visited 60 years ago.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Competition for food becomes fierce as lion numbers rise; a lioness risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: E4 - Sicily, Part 1
programme.desc: Michael dives into local life by tackling the island's murderous links to the Mafia, visiting a bizarre villa of monsters and soaking up the lavish surroundings at the most exquisite of hotels.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Whilst humans are prone to fighting the inevitability of ageing, trees have perfected the art of aging gracefully. In this episode, we will discover how mature trees do incredible things to thrive in an often turbulent world, and may even work together to do so.

programme.desc: On Flores in the Azores, Ben meets a family who live off-grid in a cottage on a steep mountain.

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a big animal adventure! First, the family takes a tour of the farm, where the farmer shows them all sorts of amazing animals. Then, Jill finds a little lost lamb, & with the help of her siblings, they adventure around the farm to find the lamb's mommy. The animal fun continues as the family visits the zoo to learn about opposites with help from the loud lions & quiet turtles!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E1 - Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time, full of kittens, tutus & fun! The big day arrives when CeCe gets her very own adorable kitten! She loves her new friend & wants to put on a show, so she gets in her ballerina outfit to dance for her kitty. Then, after hosting many tea parties for her stuffed animals, CeCe invites her real friends JJ & Bella over for a high tea party! From ice skating with Mom to imagining stick ponies are unicorns, it's always a fun & graceful day with CeCe!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.desc: Following the release of Ben's killer from prison, Jonah continues to struggle with anger and grief confronting the killer and putting family bonds to the test, and Mae and Sarah face painful truths that could change everything. programme.desc: 以近未來科幻安全危機為背景，講述了來自狂風特勤學院的曾經師徒二人姜振和白帆，在紫晶集團中邊敵對邊掩護彼此身份，姜振為意外車禍逝去的妹妹查明真相，並與白帆一同破解控制殘疾人大腦的暗黑科技公司，幫弱者脫離險境討回公道的故事。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
